metadata.description: Official Claude Code plugin marketplace for Singular Agency — productivity tools, AI utilities, and workflow automation for our team.

plugins.name: smart-summarizer-plugin
plugins.description: Adds /summarize and /briefing skills plus an AI summarizer agent for quickly distilling long documents, threads, and code files.

plugins.name: plugin-creator
plugins.description: Guides team members through creating a new plugin and submitting it as a PR. Works on macOS, Linux and Windows via Python3 — no Docker required.

plugins.name: email-weekly-recap
plugins.description: Fetches your Gmail inbox from the past 7 days, filters out automated and notification emails, and delivers a clean digest of real human conversations.

plugins.name: po-meeting-assistant
plugins.description: Autonomous meeting assistant for Product Owners. Syncs context from Slack, Gmail, and Read.ai, then delivers a strategic briefing before each client meeting.

plugins.name: hpl-meeting-summary
plugins.description: Automatically generates structured meeting summaries from Read AI and posts them to Slack — with client context, action items, next steps, and smart team tagging by technology type.

plugins.name: monthly-effort-tracker
plugins.description: Analyzes Google Calendar meetings for any month and generates an effort breakdown table by project, with automatic detection of new projects.

plugins.name: calendar-automatcher
plugins.description: Encuentra y agenda automáticamente un sync táctico de 30 minutos entre PM, PO y Talento.

plugins.name: trustworthiness-report
plugins.description: Generate evidence-based Trustworthiness Reports for talents by analyzing Read AI meeting transcripts across five evaluation criteria

plugins.name: multi-google
plugins.description: Full Google Workspace assistant across multiple accounts. Gmail, Calendar, Drive — one Google Sign-In per account, no configuration needed.
